mapper.select: select cuv.id, cuv.create_time, cuv.user_id, cuv.merchant_id, cuv.operator_id, cuv.verified_state, cuv.update_time, cuv.remarks, cmi.merchant_name, cuv.name_last_char, cuv.deleted from cm_user_verified cuv left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cuv.merchant_id = cmi.id where cuv.deleted = '0' and cuv.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update cm_user_verified set deleted = '0', verified_state = '0', remarks = '待认证', merchant_id = #{merchantId}, name_last_char = #{nameLastChar} where user_id = #{userId}
